description: Cross-cutting introduction of mcp_server/benchmarks/ convention for any MCP server (ours + forks). Promotes spec-packet bake-off evidence into skill-local discoverable folders with date-based subfolders (benchmark-YYYY-MM-DD/) and sk-doc-compliant benchmark_report.md. First two adopters: mk-spec-memory (May 17, 2026) and mcp-coco-index (May 18, 2026).
